prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 2.5L inline-6 (engine code: *Tipo 250F 2.5L DOHC*) with a fully restored and balanced *Tipo 250F* block bored to 2.7L (84mm bore, 80mm stroke) using forged Mahle pistons (12.5:1 compression ratio) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for sustained 8,500 RPM operation. Pair with a custom camshaft profile by *Tecnodrive* (290° duration, 11.5mm lift) and titanium retainers from *Ferrea Racing* to optimize airflow for the original Weber 45DCOE3 carburetors (re-jetted with 185 main jets and 200 air correctors).

Forced Induction (Optional Track Build): Install a *Rotomaster TO4B* turbocharger (T3/T4 hybrid, .63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom *Spearco* air-to-water intercooler (2.5L capacity) and a *TurboSmart* 45mm wastegate (set to 18 psi). The turbo system must retain the original *Tipo 250F* intake manifold (ported and polished) and pair with a *MSD 6AL* ignition system with *NGK B9EGV* racing plugs gapped at 0.020" for high-RPM stability. Fuel delivery is managed via a *Bosch 044* high-flow pump and *Aeromotive* adjustable fuel pressure regulator (set to 5.5 bar).

Drivetrain & Chassis: Replace the original 4-speed gearbox with a *Hewland 5-speed transaxle* (type DG300, straight-cut gears) paired with a *Tilton* triple-plate ceramic clutch (7.25" diameter). The rear differential is upgraded to a *Quaife ATB* limited-slip unit with a 3.7:1 final drive ratio. Suspension is fully rebuilt with *Öhlins TTX40* coilovers (2-way adjustable, 200lb/in front springs, 250lb/in rear) and *Whiteline* spherical bearing control arms. Braking is handled by *Brembo* 4-piston calipers (330mm vented rotors front, 300mm rear) with *Ferodo DS3000* pads and *Goodridge* braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Bodywork: Replace the original aluminum panels with a *Zagato*-inspired hand-formed aluminum body kit (0.8mm thickness) featuring a single-piece front clip with integrated *NACA* ducts for brake cooling, a revised rear deck with a *Gurney flap* (20mm height) for downforce, and a *Momo* quick-release steering wheel boss for rapid driver changes. The body is finished in *PPG* custom-mixed *Rosso Corsa* (code: 923) with a *3M* matte clear coat for UV resistance.

Interior: Strip the original interior and install a *Sparco* 6-point FIA-spec roll cage (chrome-moly steel, 1.75" diameter) with *Schroth* 6-point harnesses (ASM model). The dashboard is replaced with a *Motec C127* digital dash (configured for *Tipo 250F* sensors) and a *Pegasus* carbon fiber steering wheel (320mm diameter, suede grip). Seating is a *Recaro Pole Position* (carbon-Kevlar shell) with *OMP* fireproof padding and *Takata* 4-point belts.

Aerodynamics: Add a *Rocket Bunny*-style front splitter (carbon fiber, 50mm overhang) with *AeroCatch* quick-release mounts and a *Voltex*-inspired rear diffuser (3-stage, 150mm height) with integrated *Veloce* LED brake cooling ducts. Side skirts are custom-fabricated from *Aerocatch* aluminum (20mm lower than stock) to reduce lift. The rear wing is a *9 Lives Racing* GT3-spec unit (1,200mm width, 300mm chord) with *Aeroflow* adjustable endplates (set to 12° angle of attack).
